display.purpose: Page titles and hero text. One per page maximum.

headline.purpose: Section headers and card titles. The workhorse heading.

title.purpose: Subsection headers and list item titles.

body.purpose: Running text, descriptions, form labels. Max 65ch.

label.purpose: Buttons, badges, navigation, metadata. Compact and functional.

mono.purpose: Code blocks, technical labels, inline code.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: High-emphasis action. Near-white fill on dark surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.922 0 0); color: oklch(0.205 0 0); padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 100ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.880 0 0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.556 0 0); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(0.269 0 0); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 100ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.320 0 0); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.556 0 0); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.985 0 0); padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 100ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.269 0 0); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.556 0 0); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Danger action. Red fill, reserved for destructive confirmations only.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { background: oklch(0.704 0.191 22.216); color: oklch(1 0 0); padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 100ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1); } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: oklch(0.620 0.191 22.216); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.556 0 0); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field. Transparent background with faint border.
components.css: .ds-input { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.985 0 0); padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 15%); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.6; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 100ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.708 0 0); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.556 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.556 0 0 / 20%); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Elevated surface container. Tonal layering for depth.
components.html:
Card Title
Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.205 0 0); border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 10%); } .ds-card-header { margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: oklch(0.985 0 0); } .ds-card-content { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.708 0 0); }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar or top-nav item. Label-scale, ghost treatment.
components.html: DashboardPosts
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-nav-item { display: block; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: oklch(0.708 0 0); text-decoration: none; transition: background 100ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1), color 100ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.269 0 0); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); } .ds-nav-active { background: oklch(0.269 0 0); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Status or category indicator. Compact label-scale.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.269 0 0); color: oklch(0.708 0 0); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; line-height: 1.4; }

narrative.overview:
A design system built on neutral density and tonal layering. Every surface earns its elevation through lightness shifts, not shadows. The palette is intentionally achromatic: near-black backgrounds, mid-tone surfaces, and near-white text, with color reserved strictly for destructive states and a single sidebar accent.

This system rejects decoration. No gradients on text, no glassmorphism, no bouncing transitions. The aesthetic is Linear-adjacent: tight spacing, confident weight contrast, and information density that rewards scanning.
keyCharacteristics: Fully achromatic palette (chroma 0 across all neutrals)
Tonal layering for depth instead of box-shadow
Tight component density with generous content spacing
Dark-first with light theme as a parallel mode

rules.name: The Achromatic Rule
rules.body: All neutrals must sit on the zero-chroma axis. Any gray with visible hue violates the system.

rules.name: The Tonal Layering Rule
rules.body: Depth is conveyed through lightness steps between surfaces, never through box-shadow.

rules.name: The Weight Contrast Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is driven by font-weight contrast (>=600 vs 400), not by size alone.

rules.name: The Single Display Rule
rules.body: Each page gets exactly one display-scale element. Two display elements on the same screen means the hierarchy has collapsed.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Every surface starts without shadow. Shadows appear only as transient state feedback, never as a permanent resting treatment.

dos: Do use tonal layering for depth. Background → Card → Secondary is the standard three-tier hierarchy.
Do keep all neutrals on the achromatic axis. Zero chroma, zero hue.
Do use font-weight contrast (>=600 vs 400) as the primary hierarchy mechanism.
Do keep button padding compact (8px 16px). This is a dense interface.
Do use label-scale typography (12px, medium weight) for all interactive elements.
Do respect the flat-by-default rule. Shadows are for transient states only.
Do use the single display rule. One display-scale heading per page, maximum.
donts: Don't use box-shadow as a resting treatment on any component. Use lighter backgrounds for elevation.
Don't add hue to neutrals. No blue-grays, no warm-grays, no tinted backgrounds.
Don't use gradient text. One solid color per element.
Don't apply glassmorphism or backdrop-blur as decoration.
Don't create identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly.
Don't use modal dialogs as a first interaction pattern. Exhaust inline alternatives first.
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, padding). Animate opacity and transform only.
Don't exceed 10% chroma on any neutral. The system is achromatic by design.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing curves. Ease-out with exponential curves only.
Don't restate headings in body copy. Every word earns its place.
